title: Internal Server Error
detail:
(sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql.asyncpg.IntegrityError) <class 'asyncpg.exceptions.ForeignKeyViolationError'>: insert or update on table "voter_tag_members" violates foreign key constraint "voter_tag_members_tag_id_fkey"
DETAIL:  Key (tag_id)=(83b76b38-fb82-4756-8551-d3afca638f28) is not present in table "voter_tags".
[SQL: INSERT INTO voter_tag_members (voter_id, tag_id) VALUES ($1::UUID, $2::UUID)]
[parameters: (UUID('77abc8c4-89c6-4d74-89b1-47abdd608d28'), UUID('83b76b38-fb82-4756-8551-d3afca638f28'))]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/gkpj)
